states.name: Freya
states.title: Goddess of Blazing Flames
states.description: Battle was the entirety of her world. It was the ultimate way to speak heart to heart, to convey love, and to etch her existence into the world.

states.name: Freya
states.title: Goddess of Blazing Flames
states.description: However, now that she has to lead survivors and protect the weak, her values have wavered for the first time. The muffled sobs she hears on sleepless nights, the laments of those who have lost their homes, the small voices crying out in hunger... these were things her power, no matter how great, could not defeat.

states.name: Freya
states.title: Goddess of Blazing Flames
states.description: To protect those under her care, for the first time her life, Freya fetched water, stayed in hiding, and fought not to destroy—but to protect. She distanced herself from the blood-boiling, thrilling battles she once loved. And yet, she could feel it clearly—she was becoming stronger than ever before.
